author: Akshai Padmanabhan
name: SP1024 7x512 KV4 Non-Record
blurb: Non-record 16MB submission: SP-1024 7x512 KV4 tied-embedding run built from the published train_gpt.py. Relative to the 9-layer baseline family, reducing depth to 7 improved the capacity-speed tradeoff under the 600-second wallclock cap on a 1xA100 dev run. Final int8+zlib roundtrip metric was 1.37972416 under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
